Defines a singleton instance of the `LibraryRegistry` for JerryScript on Mbed OS.

# Purpose

It includes the header file `registry.h` from the `jerryscript-mbed-library-registry` directory, which suggests that it is related to managing a registry of libraries. The code defines a static instance of the `LibraryRegistry` class within the `mbed::js` namespace. This instance is likely used to manage and provide access to a collection of libraries or modules that can be utilized within the JerryScript environment on mbed devices.
